fields.content: F.S. §744.309(3) — felony disqualification. A person convicted of a felony is not qualified to serve as guardian. Confirm with the proposed guardian before proceeding.

fields.label: Petitioner(s) are the same people as the proposed Personal Representative(s) (most common — auto-fills from the PR rows below)

fields.name: petitioners
fields.label: Petitioner(s) — add one row per person filing the petition

fields.name: petitioner_has_prior_conviction
fields.label: Any petitioner has been convicted of elder/disabled abuse, neglect, or exploitation (Fla. Stat. 825.101)

fields.label: County of domicile at death (FL residents only)

fields.name: beneficiaries
fields.label: Beneficiaries of the estate (and surviving spouse, if any)

fields.name: _venue_help
fields.content: Check each statutory reason that applies (§733.101). Multiple may be checked if relevant.

fields.name: venue_reason_type_domicile_fl
fields.label: Decedent was domiciled in this county at the time of death

fields.name: venue_reason_type_property
fields.label: Decedent was not a Florida resident but had property in this county at the time of death

fields.name: venue_reason_type_debtor
fields.label: Decedent was not a Florida resident and had no property in Florida, but a debtor of the decedent resides in this county

fields.name: _pr_felony_warning
fields.content: ⚠ A person who has been convicted of a felony is disqualified from serving as Personal Representative under §733.303(1)(a), Fla. Stat. Do NOT propose anyone with a felony conviction — the court will reject the petition.

fields.name: prs
fields.label: Personal Representative(s) — add one row per PR

fields.name: higher_preference_exists
fields.label: Someone else has equal or higher statutory preference to serve as PR

fields.name: higher_preference_names
fields.label: If yes, name(s) of person(s) with higher preference

fields.name: higher_preference_formal_notice
fields.label: If yes, formal notice will be served on such person(s)

fields.name: estate_assets
fields.label: Estate assets — add one row per asset

fields.name: estate_tax_return_required
fields.label: Federal estate tax return will be required

fields.label: Domiciliary/principal proceedings pending in another jurisdiction (auto-set for ancillary)

fields.label: Domiciliary court name (e.g. 'Surrogate's Court, New York County')

fields.name: codicil_dates
fields.label: Codicil date(s) (blank if none; separate multiple with commas)

forms.name: Petition for Summary Administration (smart — testate/intestate, single/multi, dom/ancillary)

fields.name: petitioners
fields.label: Petitioner(s) — add one row per person filing the petition

subfields.name: pet_interest
subfields.label: Interest in estate
subfields.placeholder: e.g., a beneficiary, surviving spouse, sole heir

fields.name: _venue_help
fields.content: Venue reason — at least one must apply for summary admin filed in this county.

fields.name: venue_reason_type_domicile_fl
fields.label: Decedent was domiciled in this county at the time of death

fields.name: venue_reason_type_property
fields.label: Decedent was not a Florida resident but had property in this county at the time of death

fields.name: venue_reason_type_debtor
fields.label: Decedent was not a Florida resident and had no property in Florida, but a debtor of the decedent resides in this county

fields.name: codicil_dates
fields.label: Codicil date(s) (blank if none; separate multiple with commas)

fields.name: _qual_help
fields.content: Check each ground that applies. At least one must apply for summary admin.

fields.name: qualifies_no_admin_required
fields.label: Decedent's will does not direct administration as required by Florida Statutes Chapter 733

fields.name: qualifies_under_75k
fields.label: Value of the entire estate subject to administration in this state, less exempt property, does not exceed $75,000

fields.name: qualifies_2_year_rule
fields.label: Decedent has been dead for more than two years

fields.name: domiciliary_proceedings_pending
fields.label: Domiciliary/principal proceedings pending in another jurisdiction (auto-set for ancillary)

fields.name: domiciliary_court_name
fields.label: Domiciliary court name (e.g. 'Surrogate's Court, New York County')

fields.name: estate_assets
fields.label: Estate assets (separately designate protected homestead and exempt property)

options.label: All claims of creditors are barred
Diligent search done; estate is not indebted
Diligent search done; estate is indebted (provision for payment on attached schedule)

fields.name: summary_admin_distributees
fields.label: Distribution plan — to whom assets will be distributed

subfields.name: dist_share
subfields.label: Asset, share or amount
subfields.placeholder: e.g., '1/2 of all assets', '$10,000', 'the homestead at 123 Main St'

fields.label: Subscribing/attesting witness name(s) — required if NOT self-proved

fields.label: Filing an authenticated copy of the will (nonresident decedent only)

fields.label: TO: (names and addresses of those being noticed)

options.label: Interested person (other than creditor) — heir, beneficiary, etc.
